basic_details.job_title: Oil India Paramedical Laboratory Technician Recruitment 2026 - Apply walkin
basic_details.short_information: Oil India Limited (OIL) is engaging 02 Contractual Paramedical Laboratory Technician posts. Walk-in on 31 July 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Initial 06 months, extendable up to maximum 24 months

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date of registration for Walk-in. Only candidates domiciled in Assam and Arunachal Pradesh are eligible.
qualification.education_qualification: 10+2 in Science + Bachelor in Medical Laboratory Technology (BMLT) 3 years OR 10+2 in Science + Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology (DMLT) 2 years + minimum 02 years post qualification relevant experience

vacancy_details.PwBD Suitability: a) HH b) OA, OL, CP, LC, Dw, AAV c) ASD (M), SLD, MI d) MD involving a to c

pwd_wise_breakdown.pwbd_suitability: a) HH b) OA, OL, CP, LC, Dw, AAV c) ASD (M), SLD, MI d) MD involving a to c

salary_details.details: Fixed Emolument: ₹21,450/- per month (based on attendance including paid leave) Variable Emolument: ₹825/- per working day | OIL Contractual Paramedical Laboratory Technician Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process Selection will be based on Walk-in for Personal Assessment(s) of total 100 marks. Qualifying marks: 50 for all categories. Assessment parameters include Professional Knowledge & Skills, Personal Attributes, and Soft Skills. Final selection on merit. | Details of Walk-in | Documents Required Candidates must bring Original + Self-attested copies of: | Filled Personal Bio-Data Form Recent passport-size photograph Photo ID & Address Proof Date of Birth proof (Class 10th) Educational qualifications (Marksheets & Certificates) Experience Certificates Caste / EWS / PwBD Certificates (if applicable) No-Objection Certificate (if employed)

important_instructions: This is purely contractual engagement. No right for regularization/absorption. Candidates must be physically and medically fit. Mobile phones/electronic devices are strictly prohibited in the venue. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. OIL reserves the right to cancel the process at any stage.

content_sections.heading: Oil India Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: Oil India Limited (OIL) is engaging 02 Contractual Paramedical Laboratory Technician posts. Walk-in on 31 July 2026.

rows.details: Initial 06 months, extendable up to maximum 24 months
Walk-in for Personal Assessment(s) + Document Verification + Medical Fitness
Occupational Health Centre, OIL Hospital, Duliajan, Assam

rows.event: Date of Walk-in for Personal Assessment(s)

content_sections.heading: OIL India Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: A total of 02 contractual positions have been announced. Candidates must be domiciled in Assam or Arunachal Pradesh. PwBD (Persons with Benchmark Disabilities) - Categories Eligible

rows.pwbd_suitability: a) HH b) OA, OL, CP, LC, Dw, AAV c) ASD (M), SLD, MI d) MD involving a to c

content_sections.heading: OIL India Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date of registration for Walk-in. Only candidates domiciled in Assam and Arunachal Pradesh are eligible.

rows.details: 10+2 in Science + Bachelor in Medical Laboratory Technology (BMLT) 3 years OR 10+2 in Science + Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology (DMLT) 2 years + minimum 02 years post qualification relevant experience
Minimum 18 years; Maximum: General-40 years, OBC(NCL)-43 years

content_sections.heading: OIL India Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Fixed Emolument: ₹21,450/- per month (based on attendance including paid leave) Variable Emolument: ₹825/- per working day OIL Contractual Paramedical Laboratory Technician Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process Selection will be based on Walk-in for Personal Assessment(s) of total 100 marks. Qualifying marks: 50 for all categories. Assessment parameters include Professional Knowledge & Skills, Personal Attributes, and Soft Skills. Final selection on merit. Details of Walk-in Documents Required Candidates must bring Original + Self-attested copies of: Filled Personal Bio-Data Form Recent passport-size photograph Photo ID & Address Proof Date of Birth proof (Class 10th) Educational qualifications (Marksheets & Certificates) Experience Certificates Caste / EWS / PwBD Certificates (if applicable) No-Objection Certificate (if employed)

rows.venue: Occupational Health Centre, OIL Hospital, Duliajan, Assam

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for OIL India Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: This is purely contractual engagement. No right for regularization/absorption. Candidates must be physically and medically fit. Mobile phones/electronic devices are strictly prohibited in the venue. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. OIL reserves the right to cancel the process at any stage.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for OIL Paramedical Laboratory Technician 2026?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Registration is scheduled on 31 July 2026 from 07:00 AM to 09:00 AM. No registration will be allowed after 09:00 AM.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in OIL Contractual Paramedical Laboratory Technician Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Oil India Limited has announced 02 vacancies (UR-01, OBC(NCL)-01) for Contractual Paramedical Laboratory Technician posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for OIL Laboratory Technician 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed 10+2 in Science stream + BMLT (3 years) OR DMLT (2 years) with minimum 02 years post-qualification relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for OIL Paramedical Laboratory Technician posts?
faq.answer: Minimum age is 18 years. Maximum age is 40 years for General and 43 years for OBC (NCL) candidates as on the date of registration.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary / emolument for OIL Contractual Laboratory Technician?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive Fixed Emolument of ₹21,450/- per month + Variable Emolument of ₹825/- per working day.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for OIL Paramedical Laboratory Technician 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is based on Walk-in Personal Assessment(s) (100 marks), Document Verification, and Medical Examination. Minimum qualifying marks are 50.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required for OIL Walk-in on 31 July 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry Original + Self-attested copies of Bio-Data Form, Photo ID, Class 10th certificate, educational certificates, experience certificates, caste/PwBD certificates (if applicable), and recent passport-size photograph.
